grayscale.name: ITU-R BT.709 Luminance
grayscale.description: Human photopic vision weighting. Heavily green dominant.

grayscale.name: ITU-R BT.601 Luminance
grayscale.description: Studio encoding parameters of digital television for standard 4:3 and wide-screen 16:9 aspect ratios

grayscale.name: Orthochromatic (~1920s)
grayscale.description: Typical silent-era film stock. Dark lips, lighter skin.

grayscale.description: UV through blue only. The Civil War era look.
